## Summary

- [ ] Linked issue (or `N/A`)
- [ ] Summary of changes
- [ ] Rationale/context

## Type of Change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill content improvement
- [ ] MCP server change (requires `npm run build`)
- [ ] Installer change
- [ ] Documentation / config only

## Validation

- Command run:
- Result:

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid frontmatter with `name` and `description`
- [ ] Description is written to trigger correctly in agent searches
- [ ] No duplicate skills — checked for overlapping existing skills
- [ ] Support files only included where they add real execution value
- [ ] If `src/` was changed: `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Documentation Updated

- [ ] README/docs update not needed
- [ ] README/docs updated to match changes

## Release Impact

- [ ] No release impact
- [ ] Release notes/changelog follow-up needed

## Codex Review Needed

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes
